entry.title: SAC Lookup-Table - IF Statement
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am currently struggling with a rather unusual problem in SAC. In SAC we are using various data actions to calculate price points of specific articles. This working out very well. Now the question is: If this price point lies between a specific range, I would like to assign the property of the range. See the following example data sets from excel:

Dataset A:

ArticlePrice
A10
B15
C25

Dataset B:

Start RangeEnd RangeAssignment
05Low Price
512Mid Price
1220High Price
20100

Exclusive Price

Now in SAC I have been able to calculate the prices already via data action. Is there anyway to assign the property of the ranges to Dataset A.

One way would be to not create Dataset B, but instead have the range assignments in a if statement in Data Action of Datamodel A. But this is not feasible for us, as this assignment is used in several places and consists of over 50 lines of ranges. 

The final outcome should be like:

ArticlePriceAssignment
A10Mid Price
B15High Price
C25Exclusive Price

 

Do you have any ideas?

 

Thank you and best

xml file: 

handler: 

service file:

and my error :

 

Thank you for your responses.

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Done.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
Simplest method to create a customizing table with radio buttons/checkboxes
entry.content:
Many times, answer lies in simple things, and we try to over complicate them. So, I directly come to the point; to create customizing table with radio buttons/checks we don’t have to use any Table Maintenance Generator events or module pool. Below are the detailed steps to handle this.

 

Step 1: Create a custom table from SE11 T-code.

 

Step 2: Add required fields in the table and keep the fields which needs to be shown as radio   buttons/checkboxes as CHAR 1 type.

 

Step 3: Select required Enhancement Category and Technical Settings. Save and Activate.

 

 

Step 4: Create Table Maintenance Generator

 

Step 5: Go to T-code SE80 and search by Function Group

 

Step 6: Expand Screens and Click on Screen number. Click Layout.

 

 

Step 7: Right click on relevant column >> Convert >> Checkbox >> Left button. Save and Activate.

 

 

Step 8: Now, try to add lines in table via SM30 T-code.

 

 

Follow my profile to be notified of the next blog post. Please feel free to ask any questions you have in the comments section below.

entry.title: Experience at First SAP Community Meet-Up || Powered By Innoverv || 17th August,2024 || Kolkata
entry.content:
Greetings, Everyone!!

We as a SAP Community Kolkata team wanted to take a moment to express our heartfelt gratitude for arranging the exceptional event, SAP Community meet-up powered by INNOVERV on their first year anniversary and visionary expansion of 150+ more SAP consultants based out of Kolkata.

Also thank you @sveabecker , @laurap,  @ChristopherA,  @Katherina  for giving us the opportunity to grow the SAP Kolkata Community. Also, thank you @DataTherapist for making us more capable to organize and handle such events. Thank you @SitabjaB, @Soham_SCM, @SohamBhKoL, @Shrestha, @TanushreeD, @Kamallica, @soumyajit, @Victor  and Innoverv Volunteers for being a great team.

 

Key Insights of today’s event

  1. How Gen-AI and Cloud is impacting the global market.

Gen-AI within SAP's cloud environment accelerates innovation by enabling advanced analytics, predictive modelling, and customized solutions, helping businesses quickly adapt to market changes. SAP's cloud infrastructure provides scalable and flexible resources, allowing companies to expand and innovate without the constraints of traditional IT setups. With AI-driven insights and analytics, SAP helps businesses make data-driven decisions, leading to better strategic planning and market positioning. SAP's cloud solutions facilitate global collaboration by offering remote access to data and applications, which enhances cross-border teamwork and operational agility.

  1. Importance of SAP Sustainability.

SAP’s solutions help companies track and reduce their carbon footprint, implement sustainable practices, and achieve their environmental goals, which aligns with global sustainability standards. SAP provides tools for better reporting and monitoring of environmental, social, and governance (ESG) metrics, enabling businesses to demonstrate their commitment to sustainability to stakeholders and regulators. SAP’s focus on sustainability fosters innovation in areas such as resource efficiency and circular economy practices, leading to new business models and technologies that support long-term environmental goals. SAP’s sustainability tools assist companies in meeting increasingly stringent environmental regulations and standards, ensuring compliance and mitigating regulatory risks.

  1. SAP Product Roadmap.

Core Areas of Focus - Expansion and enhancement of SAP Cloud Platform and SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) to support scalability, flexibility, and integration across various cloud environments. Integration of AI, machine learning, and advanced analytics into SAP S/4HANA and other core ERP solutions to enable data-driven decision-making and automation. Continuous improvement of SAP Fiori and user interface design to enhance usability, personalization, and accessibility for end-users.

Innovation and Technology - Integration of Gen-AI capabilities to automate processes, enhance predictive analytics, and generate insights for more informed business strategies. Tools and features to support sustainability goals, such as carbon footprint tracking, resource management, and compliance with environmental regulations. Development of more seamless integration capabilities with third-party applications and technologies to ensure a connected and cohesive IT ecosystem.

Product Releases and Updates - Regular updates to core products like SAP S/4HANA, SAP SuccessFactors, SAP Ariba, and others, including new features, enhancements, and security improvements. Introduction of next-generation tools and platforms that leverage emerging technologies to address evolving business needs.

Customer-Centric Enhancements - Incorporation of customer feedback into product development to ensure solutions meet real-world needs and deliver value. Expanded resources for customer support, training, and adoption to help users effectively leverage new features and updates.

Strategic Partnerships and Ecosystem - Building strategic partnerships with other technology providers and industry leaders to enhance SAP’s offerings and integrate with complementary solutions. Growth of the SAP App Centre and other marketplaces to offer a broader range of third-party applications and add-ons.

  1. Market dependency and demand optimisation using AI-ML, Analytics and Cloud.
  2. Work for Each Other, Work with Each Other.
  3. Work under pressure and tackle difficult scenarios.

The Panel discussion about how Kolkata is becoming the Silicon Valley of SAP and the SAP growing community in world-wide, the optimal futuristic features i.e. Sustainability, SAP BTP, GEN-AI and Cloud with our renowned panelist ( Partha Chakraborty, Ambarish Dasgupta, Anindya Mitra, Asidhara Lahiri, Sourav Ganguly ). Also, thanking to ( Jo Whalley ) for guiding us the journey of growing SAP and INNOVERV disruption. We greatly appreciate ( Sana Ganguly and Veena )  for hosting this amazing event to build-up more networks.

Thank you for your unwavering support to grow the Kolkata community and for making this journey both challenging and rewarding. Together, we are not only achieving our goals but setting new standards for excellence.

Here are some beautiful moments and memories for today’s events. We are looking forward to grow more.

#SITKOL #SAPCOMMUNITYKOLKATA

entry.title: Re: Cost center assigned in sales order / Different COGS GL Account for Sample / FOC Order.
entry.content: Thank you for the valuable inputs on FOC Sales. Very clearly explained.

entry.title: Asset transfer speed degrading (ABUMN slow)
entry.content:
Hi experts
Any ideas as to how to perform a fast inter-company asset transfer?

We are "componentising" assets (breaking a large singular asset up) into smaller assets with correct useful lives using a transfer (transaction code ABUMN), from old historical assets to newly defined assets (at component level).

Unfortunately, over time, the transaction gets slower and slower due to the increasing number of transactions on the source asset. It started as high as 200 transfers per second, and is now taking over 4 seconds to do 1. We have 900,000 components to transfer to.
Any ideas as to how to execute a fast transfer between assets?

entry.title: Re: Simplest method to create a customizing table with radio buttons/checkboxes
entry.content: Please don't post this article as a Discussion, please post it as a Blog Post. Application Development Blog Posts | SAP Community > Start a blog post.

entry.title: Re: Requirement: Create an Email Alert if an Inbound EDI fails to process IDOC in BD87

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano,

I am very interested in participating in the digital skills initiative. I recently graduated and currently live in a major city with a high cost of living. Unfortunately, the IT industry is experiencing significant layoffs, making it a challenging time to start a career.

Growing up in a remote area of Vietnam, I didn’t have access to the internet until I began high school. Despite these challenges, I have developed a strong passion for technology and am now eager to transition into SAP. My background has instilled in me a deep appreciation for the opportunities that digital skills can bring, especially for those in underprivileged areas.

I believe this program would be an excellent fit for me, and I am committed to making the most of this learning opportunity.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Phong

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
EWM-Ware House Process Type
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I have an issue where I have created a new Ware House type by copying Process Type 1010, and also activated the indicator "Select HU Without Storage Process", then created a delivery with two products,

My system is decentralized  EWM

1) First Product without HU for creating Product ware house task in EWM

2) Second Product is with HU so that it can create HU Ware House Task in EWM

But in EWM both are creating Product Ware House Task with process type 1010 and HU Task is not getting created

I have done below config already

1) Creation of new Storage Process copying Storage Process 1010 activated the indicator "Select HU Without Storage Process", then created a delivery with two products,

2) Created Control Indicator for determining Ware House Process type

3) Determination of Process type where Control indicator assigned to New ware house process type with document type and against Ware House

4) Control indicator was assigned to one Product , against which is supposed to create Ware House task

entry.title: Couldn't choose user status profile in Create Technical Object app
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to assign user status profile and set the status manually in Create/Change technical object. But the field is read only even though I have given the "Maintenance planner" role. In addition, maybe related with this business catalog, EAM - Technical Object (SAP_EAM_BC_TO_MC). I couldn't also see this catalog as well in the system. Please guide me how I can define the status profile. Please kindly see the attachment also.

 

Thanks for your advice.

 

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Re: Requirement: Create an Email Alert if an Inbound EDI...
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing that information and link.

I will investigate that in more detail.

For now the requirement/ask is an automated alert, just so we know we have had an IDOC issue, in all cases we would then log on and manually fix the issue before the issue impacts on the Warehouses in the business (inbound delivery not created etc)

For context:

Recently our 3rd party Vendor submitted an EDI into our system which had Handling Units that had already been used 6 months ago.

It appears our Vendor had recycled their HU range which inturn caysed several IDOC fails in BD87 on our side.

Plan of action for us us to archive Handling Units after a month to avoid that happening again.

entry.title: Re: Total Business Volume RBVT getting summed at header l...
entry.content:
Hello Anna,

did you find a solution for this approach?

I had the same issue regarding the scale values and I created a customer specific condition ZRS1 which replaces RES1 in the pricing procedure for multiple clients. ZRS1 doesn't have the group condition features as RES1 and because of that the processing of the scale value works in my case.

I am also not happy with the presentation of the RBVT sum on the header level either. I could imagine that there might be a better way for this problem. But the approach with ZRS1 was the first thing that came to my mind.

Best regards,

Christoph

entry.title: Why is doing batch without stock while doing POGI?
entry.content:
Dear SD Expert

When I am going to do PGI then I want to do a batch search before that I checked the batch quantity in MMBE and found that there is a quantity in only 1 batch of 10,000 QTY. but while doing PGI all the batches of that material are created in all the batch searches showing PGI Transaction.

I require that while doing PGI only batch search is done. Only the stock batch will show and the batch that does not have stock will not show in the PGi search.

MMBE

VL01N

Thanks 

M.G Rabbani

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi, @David_Chaviano

 I'm really excited for the chance to join the Digital Skills initiative. I'm a creative who's interested in tech –  I have done the Google IT support certificatation, some AI courses but have no experience with SAP yet. This initative would be a great chance to explore, learn and get certifications that wouldn't be possible for me otherwise for now.

Looking forward to the invitation and learning process!

Sabine

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi,

I have been involved with SAP projects for a couple of decades as a business, but I would like to expand my technical skills in order to work as a SAP consultant. In order to make a mid-life job transition, I would really like to join this initiative, follow the learning path, and obtain my SAP certification.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi everyone, greetings from Latvia!

I'm a creative with an interest in tech – I'm a web admin, have done Google IT support certification and taken some university and self-paced courses about AI and machine learning. I love to learn but apart from a bunch of Youtube videos, I don't have an experience with SAP, so I'm still in process of deciding if jumping into exploration of SAP was a dumb or a brave idea. 🙂

I'm starting to explore the community platform and learning resources, but if you have any suggestions on what courses or learning paths to start with for an enthusiastic newbie – I'm all ears!

Sabine

I need to move all the entries of my Z*table in a TR in SAP DEv system & to other SAP QA system.

Table Contents R3TR TABU TDDAT
Table Contents R3TR TABU TVDIR

Are these enough to move my table contents to other system? Or is there any more i am missing?

entry.title: Sap S4 HANA to CRM on premise BUPA replication
entry.content:
Greetings everyone,

I established an integration between S4 and CRM systems. These are currently working properly. However, in the BUPA structure, some fields updated in S4 do not come to the CRM system. For example, BU_SORT1 and BU_SORT2 fields. When these fields are updated, there is no flow from S4 to CRM, but there is no such problem in other fields. Also, there is no such problem from CRM to S4. BUPA, which I tried, is an organization and a customer also exists in KNA structures. Can you help me with this?

entry.title: Re: Not able to rotate the line from Shapes
entry.content:
Hi Vish,

In the Styling panel, you can use the Rotate functionality once you have added the line shape. This will only allow either horizontal or vertical.

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: Not able to rotate the line from Shapes
entry.content:
Hi Vish,

In the Styling panel, you can use the Rotate functionality once you have added the line shape. This will only allow either horizontal or vertical. This is in Optimised.

 

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: Not able to rotate the line from Shapes

entry.title: Batch management. But he has to enter it manually.
entry.content: My client is asking for Batch Management, but he has to enter it manually only. If he forgot to enter the batches system won't create any batches automatically and throws an error to enter the batches. how i have to configure this in s/4 Hana public cloud

entry.title: Re: New Feature - Ability to Disable Welcome Emails
entry.content: It would nice to have this option at user profile level so it allows to choose the welcome email at user level and not system level. Like how it’s there in Ariba.

entry.title: Re: Authentication Failed in DpAgent
entry.content:
When you see the authentication error, there might be case that the user password is changed after setup DP agent connection with datasphere. In this case, you can request a new password in datasphere page and update the password in DP agent by following steps.

  1. At the command line, navigate to <DPAgent_root>/bin
  2. Execute one of the following commands using the --setSecureProperty parameter:
    On Windows, agentcli.bat --setSecureProperty
    On Linux, ./agentcli.sh --setSecureProperty
  3. If you want to use a different HANA User for Agent Messaging, choose Set HANA XS Username and enter the new username as prompted
  4. Choose Set HANA XS Password and enter the new password as prompted
  5. Restart the Data Provisioning Agent

There is also case that the hana db user is actually locked in the database, you can open through hana cockpit and see if the user is locked, then unlock that user, restart DP agent and check again.

Best regards
Helen

entry.title: Re: How Do I Copy Master Data Fields to a Sales Document?
entry.content:
Hi @CE6 ,

Thank you for the post. I do have a question about a requirement from customer. We need to capture customer's freight account information on the customer master and extend it to sales document and delivery document. 

Basically to create a custom field in the customer master and extend it to sales document and delivery, is this possible if so please give some insights on how to do this.

Thanks,

Brinda S
SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere News in July
entry.content: @kpsauer Does SAP suggest minimum two tenancies for Datasphere for Quality and Production? Does it have any possible complexities for managing a single tenancy for QA and Production purposes? I appreciate your insights here. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Task 0 - Pre-requisite for August developer challenge - "ABAP Core Data Services"
entry.content: Task 0 Completed

entry.title: Re: Q)DM does not retrieve right Standard Value Key(SVK)'...
entry.content:
Hi Mike!

 

Thank you for comment.

Following the steps guided by the web site you send, I couldn't those menus and options in my cockpit or environment.

 

The given solution was...

  1. In the CPI package, manually deploy the new artifact called "API_STANDARD_VALUE_KEY_SRV". Otherwise, you will get this error messasge "action execute error: Unable to fetch the metadata: Failed to execute OData request" when downloading work center. For more information, see How to Update CPI Package and Deploy Artifacts.
  2. In Cloud Connector, add a new function "CO_MES_STANDARD_VALUE_KEY_PULL" as the accessible resource in the Access Control tab. For detailed steps, please see the "Configure Access Control" section in Setting up the Cloud Connector.

 

In my case...

    1. I cannot find 'CPI package' menu on my cockpit both of DMC and ERP Hana Cloud.

    2. Cloud Connector seems to be used for on-premise connection, but I don't use it. I feel some difficult.

 

In addition, one of the problems was solved. Parameter values in DM are now visible, though parameter names and disc. aren't, yet I don't know what was changed :D.

 

Best regards,

Wonpyo

entry.title: Re: No PO without PR
entry.content:
Dear @RashidKhan 

You may find the BAdI below

Change of Field Control for Purchase Order Item (MM_PUR_S4_PO_FLDCNTRL_SIMPLE)

With this BAdI, you can

Change the field control in purchase order apps by modifying the properties of specific fields on item level. These fields can be made hidden, read-only, mandatory, or optional.

Final Check before Saving Purchase Order (BD_MMPUR_FINAL_CHECK_PO)

With this BAdI, you can

Implement own checks before a purchase order is saved.

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/8676e556cca85267e10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Field ServiceRequestClassificationCode in Service Request C4C
entry.content:
Hi,

Just want to confirm, as SetAsRelevant action can be called from any custom action, same way we can be used it using Function import in Custom ODATA as standard ODATA we cant see that action. Please suggest.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Revenue account determination for sample order with values
entry.content: Hi

entry.title: Re: Revenue account determination for sample order with v...
entry.content:
Hi,
Please use the concept of Revenue Account Determination.
Details refer to Revenue Account Determination | SAP Help Portal
Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Purchasing group restrictions to create purchase orders
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: 公有云下，供应商收不到采购邮件
entry.content: 客户您好，通常在SAP系统显示发送成功的邮件，已经被发送到接收方的邮箱服务器，烦请您检查接收方的邮件服务。

entry.title: Re: Access control on the pricing condition types
entry.content:
Hi,

Do you want to implement restrictions on the condition types based on access sequences or manual inputs?

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Post Goods Receipt Without Reference in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: Great blog.

entry.title: Re: For what stand the hrtt-service?
entry.content:
@rsnit thx for your suggestions, i try to follow it:

  1. 3230140 - How to find hrtt version in XS Advanced runtime 
  2. SAP HANA database explorer release notes SAP Note 237065

It seems with my (private P-user) account i'm not able to follow both links. Is there another way to get the information?

BTW, i have a S-user ID from my company, so i try to follow How do I login with my P-user/S-user ID instead of my email address?
But the provided Login-Form only accept E-Mail or Username. I remember there used to be an ID option too, like the the linked page above shows.

If this is a new topic, then let me know

entry.title: Re: Customer Invoice and Peppol 2408 Update
entry.content: Thank you for your response. Is it possible to test the updates in a tenant that does not have a subscription to the Peppol Exchange Service for the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Cloud Edition? Or is testing possible regardless of whether the subscripti

entry.title: Re: Users uploading documents to LMS
entry.content: My department has a similar requirement - did you find a solution for this in SAP SF Learning?

entry.title: Re: What is Best strategy to migrate 107 Material documen...
entry.content:
Dear @PranavMahajan 

In the migration scope only movement type 561 is supported to post the initial balance, you may consider to use the API below to post goods movement type 107

https://api.sap.com/api/API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV/overview

entry.title: Re: How configure and use external Tax Engine calculation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
@wterceiro 

Estou configurando o SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public. Criei uma cópia da pricing SD Y14101 para atribuir algumas fórmulas e condições próprias.

Como eu faço para o mapear a nova pricing com as condições e valores da NF-e? No S/4HANA Private eu faço as configurações pela J1BTAX ou pela SPRO.

Financial accounting > Financial accounting configuration > VAT (IVA) > Global Settings > Brazil > Condition-based tax calculation > Assign SD tax values ​​to Invoice fields.

No CBC (Central busines configuration) existe o mapeamento das condições da NF-e somente para MM. Para SD não encontrei nada.

Obrigado!
